object.name: getManagedBotToken
object.description: Use this method to get the token of a managed bot. Returns the token as String on success.
object.html_description: Use this method to get the token of a managed bot. Returns the token as String on success.
object.rst_description: Use this method to get the token of a managed bot. Returns the token as *String* on success.

annotations.description: User identifier of the managed bot whose token will be returned

annotations.rst_description: User identifier of the managed bot whose token will be returned
annotations.name: user_id
